note: About 1 hour in. FireBoard pit reads 228 — if the Yoder controller says 250, that's just probe placement (grate runs cooler than dome) and you're fine. If the controller also reads low, nudge setpoint to 265. Probe 1 at 126 is on pace. Probe 2 reads like it's in air, not meat — re-seat at the 12:30 opening.
